network_summary: Dr. Michael Teuscher, DDS is a founder-dentist with 30+ years in St. Charles, IL who built a family multi-generational dental practice. Three of his sons — Riley, Brayden, and Jameson Teuscher — are licensed DMDs practicing at the same group. The network operates under two active addresses: the original 40W320 Lafox Rd office (carrying two NPPES registrations — 'Teuscher Dental' NPI 1053896183 est. 1987 and 'Teuscher Dental Group' NPI 1225196173 — that normalize to the same building) and a second office at 40W131 Campton Crossings Dr operating as 'Teuscher Legacy Dental.' No DSO/MSO/PE structure found; the practice website explicitly presents itself as a family-owned group. The AO cluster reach=3 represents a father-and-sons private group, NOT a DSO or MSO-backed platform.

The downstream gate should treat one of these as a duplicate_location candidate and not double-count the Lafox Rd building in the GP denominator.
evidence_chain: AO signal: MICHAEL TEUSCHER appears as authorized official on three NPPES registrations (NPIs 1053896183, 1225196173, 1326871047), all in ZIP 60175 St. Charles IL, all sharing phone (630) 762-0000 and the 'Teuscher' family brand name. Documentary corroboration: (1) teuscherdental.com/about-us confirms Dr. Michael Teuscher DDS is the founder with 30+ years, and three sons (Riley, Brayden, Jameson) are practicing DMDs at the same group — an explicitly family-owned succession practice with no DSO/MSO/PE disclosure. (2) Yelp and directory listings confirm 'Teuscher Legacy Dental' at 40W131 Campton Crossings Dr as the active branded storefront. (3) Third-party directories (Vitadox, Vitals, Healthgrades, WebMD) list Dr. Michael Teuscher at 40W320 Lafox Rd under 'Teuscher Dental'/'Teuscher Dental Group.' Conclusion: this is a dentist-founded, family-operated two-address private group with no management-company layer — dentist_multi, pe_backed=false.
future_app_notes: The Lafox Rd addresses (NPIs 1053896183 + 1225196173) should be reviewed as a potential duplicate_location pair — both normalize to 40W320 Lafox Rd with the same phone. If the practice relocated fully to Campton Crossings Dr, the Lafox Rd NPI 1053896183 (est. 1987, entity_classification=small_group) may be the legacy shell and NPI 1225196173 (solo_established, 0 providers) the org-billing NPI. Recommend a duplicate_location flag audit on this pair before any further denominator math. The Campton Crossings location (1326871047, family_practice, 4 providers) appears to be the active multi-dentist office.
